title: ADOGO® Rope Dog Lead with Soft Padded Handle and Reflective Threads Nylon Durable Dog Leash Safety 5FT Mountain Climbing Rope Twist Dog Lead For Small Medium Large Dogs (Black)
features: COMFORTABLE PADDED HANDLE - This dog lead features soft padded handles for amazing comfortable grip,just enjoy the walking with your dog and protects your hand from rope burn.
REFLECTIVE FOR NIGHT SAFETY - This 1/2 inch diameter dog leash is designed with highly reflective threads,keeps you both visible in early morning and late-evening.

HEAVY DUTY - Made of supple rock climbing nylon braided rope and durable metal clip hook,Safe enough and Excellent for any dog size including Labrador Retriever, Yorkshire,Dachshund,Poodle Bulldog Alaskan Samoyed Golden,etc.
GREAT FOR WALKING,RUNNING OR TRAINNING - This 5 feet dog leash is a perfect balance between freedom and control, give enough freedom to your dog and everything under your control.
description: Product Description About ADOGO Pay attention to the customer experience is our ADOGO mission.If you have any questions, we will give you the satisfactory answer. ADOGO dog leads made of nylon climbing ropes,added a high-density anti-biting braid layer in the middle of the rope. This design greatly improves the durability of the rope and the strength is nearly 2X that of the Ordinary rope. After rigorous testing, large dogs up to 150 pounds are free to pull! If you want to choose a strong dog leads for your Pitbull, Labrador, Golden Retriever, ADOGO dog leash is your best choice. Durable Made of supple rock climbing nylon braided rope and durable metal clip hook,Safe enough Padded Soft padded handles for amazing comfortable grip,protects your hand from rope burn 360 Rotate 360 degree tangle free swivel heavy duty clasp gives your dog best freedom. Reflective Highly reflective threads,keeps you both visible in early morning and late-evening.
